prompts.m1: What view of the given imaging is this: Axial, Coronal, Sagittal?
prompts.m3: Which plane is visible in the given imaging: [A] Axial [B] Coronal [C] Sagittal?
prompts.m4: Is the image taken in an anteroposterior view? (Yes/No)
prompts.m5: Determine the exact anatomical view of this imaging: [A] Anteroposterior (AP) [B] Lateral [C] Posteroanterior (PA)
